last_checked.note: First run: no prior state existed. GitHub's 'latest' superset-shell release by created_at was v6.1.0.2, but Datadog showed it only ever deployed to sandbox-aws-us1a (never production). v6.0.0.19, created ~20 min later the same day, is the actual production release train (6 clusters, logs through today). Tracking v6.0.0.x as the production release line going forward -- future runs should verify the picked tag actually appears in environment:production before treating it as the release to check.
